name: Amaretto Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 13-by-9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour and sugar.
4. Cut in butter until crumbly using a pastry blender or two knives.
5. Press the mixture firmly on the bottom of the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, stir cornstarch into amaretto in a small bowl.
8. Stir in sweetened condensed milk.
9. Pour the mixture evenly over the prepared crust.
10. Top with chocolate chips, coconut, and almonds; press down firmly.
11. Bake for an additional 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
13. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
14. Cut into bars.
Source: Great Holiday Baking (Woman's Day)
